raw.message:
🇬🇹 Aunque vivás lejos, ser chapín se lleva en la sangre
Enterate de lo que pasa en Guate sin andar buscando
🗞 Noticias reales en una sola app
📲 Bajala ya, ¡es gratis!

hook.summary: A woman checks her reflection in a van mirror before turning to address the viewer about time-saving news.
hook.visual_action: Woman looking into a side mirror of a yellow van, then turning and gesturing to the camera.
hook.voiceover_transcript: ¿Tienes poco tiempo? Con Nuestro Diario USA te enteras de nuestras noticias...

scene_flow: Woman introduces the app while standing next to a branded news van.
Screen recording shows the app interface and various news headlines.
Woman demonstrates using the app on her smartphone outdoors.
Woman leans against the van, reinforcing the brand connection.
End card displays the app logo and a call to download for free.
on_screen_text: Reserva tus vacaciones y pasa momentos inolvidables
Juez ordena que alias el 'Lobo' regrese a Fraijanes II
audience_proxy: Spanish-speaking expatriates in the USA who want to stay connected with news from their home country quickly.
